_doc: Per-preset diffRatio ceilings for the MapLibre parity gate. The spec asserts measured diffRatio ≤ baseline × HEADROOM. Values captured 2026-05-13 after line AA spec realignment (aa_width_px = 1/dpr + blur; alpha = clamp(-d_px / aa, 0, 1)). Tokyo presets regressed because X-GIS now produces sharper line edges than MapLibre's fragment-shader fwidth() AA — visually spec-correct but pixel-misaligned to the ML reference around every road edge. Rebake on every PR that explicitly notes a regression or improvement; do not silently relax.
